question_text:
Kth Largest Element in an Array

Find the $k$-th largest element in an unsorted array.
explanation: Use a min-heap of size $k$ to track the $k$ largest elements seen so far. After iterating through all elements, the top of the heap is the $k$-th largest.
answer:
def findKthLargest(nums, k):
    return heapq.nlargest(k, nums)[-1]
